7096.title: Uncovering Melanie's Murderer
7096.description: A study in modern crime solving techniques, used in the search for the 1984 killer of teenage Melanie. It demonstrates how traditional investigative techniques are enhanced by DNA profiling. Including interviews with the original investigation team.
